memory_display_precision_desc: Adjust memory precision in the system overview
title: Settings
update_auto_stop_desc: Automatically stop all running servers before Sea Lantern updates to prevent issues during the update process
close_action_desc: Select behavior when clicking close button
auto_stop_desc: Automatically send stop command to running servers when exiting Sea Lantern to prevent data loss
auto_eula_desc: Automatically write eula=true before starting server, eliminating manual modification
server_defaults_desc: Default parameters used when creating new servers
max_memory_desc: Recommended at least 1024MB. Large modded servers may need 4096MB or more
min_memory_desc: Recommended to set to 1/4 to 1/2 of max memory
default_java_desc: Leave blank to automatically detect the most suitable Java each time
default_run_path_desc: Default storage path for creating servers
data_dir_desc: Control where Sea Lantern stores settings, server registry, plugin data, and download caches.
data_dir_setup_desc: Before using Sea Lantern for the first time, choose where its managed data should live. You can still migrate it later in Settings.
data_dir_setup_hint: Pick a long-lived location that is easy to back up and will not be removed by build cleanup.
data_dir_source_default: Sea Lantern is currently using the unified default directory.
data_dir_source_locator: Sea Lantern is currently pinned to this directory by the locator file.
data_dir_source_env: Sea Lantern is currently forced to this directory by an environment variable.
data_dir_source_docker: Sea Lantern is running in container mode and uses the container data directory.
data_dir_source_legacy_portable: Sea Lantern detected a legacy portable directory and is still reading data from it.
plugin_dir_desc: Control where plugins installed from the marketplace or local sources are ultimately stored.
plugin_dir_source_default: Sea Lantern is currently using the default plugin directory.
plugin_dir_source_locator: Sea Lantern is currently pinned to this plugin directory by the locator file.
default_jvm_preset_desc: The JVM preset selected by default when creating a new server.
default_cpu_policy_desc: The CPU policy inherited by new servers by default.
cpu_policy_mode_placeholder: Select the default CPU affinity policy
cpu_policy_count_desc: Enter the default number of CPU cores allowed. The value must be greater than 0.
cpu_policy_explicit_desc: Enter the default CPU core list to use. The final accepted format depends on backend parsing.
cpu_policy_invalid_count: The default CPU core count must be greater than 0.
cpu_policy_invalid_explicit: The default explicit CPU core list cannot be empty.
default_jvm_args_desc: The JVM arguments appended by default when creating a new server. One argument per line.
default_jvm_args_placeholder:
One argument per line, for example
-XX:+UseG1GC
-Dfile.encoding=UTF-8
startup_notice_not_main_thread_boost: These defaults are used for new servers, but they are not direct switches for improving Minecraft main-thread performance.
jvm_args_desc: These parameters will be added to all server startups. Suitable for GC optimization parameters
startup_config_java_path_load_failed: Startup config loaded, but the current Java path could not be refreshed right now.
startup_launch_detail_load_failed: Failed to load actual startup details
max_memory_too_small: Maximum memory cannot be less than 128MB
min_memory_too_small: Minimum memory cannot be less than 128MB
min_memory_gt_max_memory: Minimum memory cannot exceed maximum memory
server_id_missing_for_java_path_save: The current server is missing an ID, so the Java path cannot be saved
port_desc: Minecraft default port is 25565. Multiple servers need different ports
console_font_size_desc: Size of console log text, default 13
max_log_lines_desc: Maximum number of log lines to keep per server, older logs are automatically cleared beyond this limit. Default 5000
appearance_desc: Customize software background and visual effects
text_customization_desc: Adjust global text colors and customize the app display name.
app_display_name_desc: Used for the sidebar brand, top-right status badge, and window title. Leave empty to keep the default name.
text_color_title_desc: Used for card titles, page headings, and other primary heading text.
text_color_text_desc: Used for regular copy, input content, and primary informational text.
text_color_description_desc: Used for descriptions, hints, secondary labels, and supporting information.
theme_desc: Select the theme appearance of the application, "Follow System" will automatically match the system's dark/light mode
font_size_desc: Adjust the size of interface text
font_family_desc: Select the font used by the interface, some fonts need to be installed on the system or loaded from the network
console_font_family_desc: Select the font used by the console interface, some fonts need to be installed on the system or loaded from the network
console_letter_spacing_desc: Adjust spacing between console characters, default 0; negative values make text tighter
acrylic_desc: Enable soft Gaussian blur glass effect, supports all platforms, compatible with background images
window_effect_desc: Choose how the desktop window uses native system materials. Native effects reduce Web rendering cost during dragging, resizing, and scrolling; an explicitly selected material is applied as-is whenever the system supports it.

window_effect_help.off: Uses a stable solid surface. Best fallback for unsupported systems and the most predictable text contrast.
window_effect_help.auto: Prefers the best native material available on the current system. Good default when you want lower rendering cost without manual tuning.
window_effect_help.blur: Provides a lighter translucent blur and prefers the system Blur material first. It looks softer, but on some Windows 11 builds it may introduce flicker or extra cost while dragging or resizing windows.
window_effect_help.acrylic: Emphasizes translucency and depth. It looks vivid, but on some Windows builds it can cost more while dragging or resizing windows. Best when stronger glass layering matters more than stability.
window_effect_help.mica: Uses the Windows 11 desktop material. Usually the best balance between native look, readability, and drag performance.
window_effect_help.vibrancy: Uses the macOS native material. It follows the system well and keeps the interface close to standard macOS apps.

background_desc: Upload an image as software background, supports PNG, JPG, WEBP and other formats
opacity_desc: Adjust the opacity of the background image (0.0 - 1.0), smaller values are more transparent
blur_desc: Add blur effect to the background to make foreground content clearer
brightness_desc: Adjust the brightness of the background image (0.0 - 2.0), 1.0 is original brightness
background_size_desc: Select how the background image is displayed
java_download_desc: If Java is not installed or you need an updated version, you can download it here
reset_desc: Are you sure you want to restore all settings to default values? This operation cannot be undone.
color_theme_desc: Customize the color theme of the software
use_preset_colortheme_desc: Select a preset color theme or customize colors
current_edit_colorplan_desc: Select the current color plan to edit
color_plan_desc: Select the color plan to edit
personalize_page_import_export: Personalization can be moved as a standalone package.
personalization_package_desc: Includes background image, window material, fonts, text color overrides, and plugin theme settings from plugins that expose personalization capabilities.
personalization_import_partial: Personalization package imported, but some plugin theme settings could not be applied
developer_mode_desc: Show log viewing, troubleshooting, and test entry points
developer_mode_toggle_desc: When enabled, a Developer Tools page appears in the sidebar.
ipv6_test_desc: Check whether your network supports IPv6
ipv6_not_supported: Your network does not support IPv6
minimal_mode_desc: Disable all animations and effects, keeping only basic rendering and interactions

next.error_description: Please try again in a moment.

developer_management.title: Developer Tools
developer_management.description: Control whether developer tools appear in the sidebar.

summary.title: Settings home
summary.description: Quick links and status for settings.

appearance.live_hint: Theme, fonts, and window material apply right away.
appearance.window_effect_fallback: Only the default material is available here.

background.title: Background
background.empty_description: Pick an image to apply it right away.
